# sevalla_object_storage_cors_policy (Resource)

Manages a CORS policy for a Sevalla object storage bucket.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "sevalla_object_storage_cors_policy" "example" {
  object_storage_id = sevalla_object_storage.example.id
  allowed_origins   = ["https://example.com", "https://app.example.com"]
  allowed_methods   = ["GET", "PUT", "POST"]
  allowed_headers   = ["Content-Type", "Authorization"]
  max_age           = 3600
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `allowed_headers` (List of String) List of allowed HTTP headers.
- `allowed_methods` (List of String) List of allowed HTTP methods.
- `allowed_origins` (List of String) List of allowed origins.
- `object_storage_id` (String) The ID of the object storage bucket.

### Optional

- `max_age` (Number) The maximum age in seconds for preflight request caching.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the CORS policy.
